_README: Per-race config for scripts/extract_body_parts.py (the generalized body-part
slicer). Keys are race folder names under Characters/Assets/Body Parts/.
Every contiguous source shares the same top-down, arms-spread pose on a flat
gray backdrop. The slicer cuts head + torso + upper_arm + forearm and emits a
body_manifest.json so the part auto-activates SkeletalBodyRig. Legs stay
procedural (top-down foreshortening) and are NOT cut.
CUT GEOMETRY can come two ways; explicit config values always win over derived:
1. A green cutline-annotation PNG ('cutlines'). Paint, over the source:
- the head outline (a closed-ish green curve around head+hair), and
- two short vertical green strokes across ONE arm marking the shoulder
cut (inner, nearer the body) and the elbow cut (outer, nearer the hand).
The slicer derives shoulder_x, elbow_x, head_bbox and the arm_y band from
these automatically (connected-component split: largest green blob = head
outline; vertical strokes = cut lines). See extract_body_parts.py.
2. Explicit numbers below (shoulder_x, elbow_x, head_bbox, arm_y, torso_y).
'headless' is OPTIONAL: a copy of the source with the head/hair painted over in
skin tone so the torso crop reads as one clean shoulder block. If omitted the
plain source is used (fine when the head does not overhang the shoulders).
FIELDS (all optional unless noted):
source*    : contiguous art filename (required)
cutlines   : annotation PNG filename (enables auto-derivation)
annotation_detect : how to find the strokes vs the source - 'diff' (default;
plain colour difference, works for any stroke colour on any
skin, e.g. green-on-green orc) or 'green' (green-shift; only
robust on non-green skin - Male Elf uses it for byte-identity)
annotation_diff_threshold : 'diff' sensitivity, sum|cut-src| (default 18)
headless   : head-painted-out PNG filename (cleaner torso/head)
shoulder_x : canvas-x of the shoulder cut on the LEFT arm
shoulder_x_right : canvas-x of the right shoulder cut (default: width - shoulder_x)
elbow_x    : canvas-x of the elbow cut on the LEFT arm
head_bbox  : [x0,y0,x1,y1] crop window around head+hair
torso_y    : [top,bottom] crop window rows for the torso (default: derived)
arm_y      : [top,bottom] crop window rows for the arm strip (default: derived)
pad        : autocrop padding px (default 4)
tuning     : SkeletalBodyRig calibration, preserved across re-runs:
head_overlap_px, rot_offset_deg{head,torso,upper_arm,forearm},
arm_flip_left (false: arm art cut from the char's LEFT side)
